AdminApproved_Subtitle: These sequences are available in the app as predefined templates.
AdminApproved_EmptyText: Approve sequences from the Pending tab.
AdminPending_Subtitle: Review scientist submissions and approve/reject them.
AdminPending_EmptyText: Everything is reviewed. Come back later.
AdminRejected_Subtitle: Rejected submissions remain editable by the scientist.
AdminRejected_EmptyText: If a scientist edits/resubmits, it returns to Pending.
AdminReview_Subtitle: Approve to publish it to the app, or reject with a reason.
AdminReview_ApproveText: This will make the sequence available in the app.
AdminReview_RejectText: Scientist will see the reason and can edit/resubmit.
